0.text: Bilateral tubular bronchiectasis with minimal peribronchial thickening

1.text: Scarring and fibroatelectasis in the right middle lobe, inferior lingular segment of the left upper lobe, and basal segments of the right lower lobe

2.text: Indeterminate parenchymal nodules in bilateral lungs, largest measuring 6 mm in the lateral basal segment of the left lower lobe
